name: The Weather Forecast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>気</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>予</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>報</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can place 1 "The Weather" Spell/Trap from your Deck face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "The Weather Forecast" once per turn. If you Link Summon a "The Weather" Link Monster, you can also use face-up "The Weather" cards in your Spell & Trap Zone as "The Weather" monsters for its Link Summon. During your Main Phase, you can: Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "The Weather" monster from your hand. You can only activate 1 "The Weather Forecast" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can place 1 "The Weather" Spell/Trap from your Deck face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "The Weather Forecast" once per turn. During your Main Phase, you can: Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "The Weather" monster from your hand. You can only activate 1 "The Weather Forecast" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
Uses Spell Cards as Link Materials
